items.h: US Justice Department Approves Paramount Skydance Takeover Of AEW Parent Company WBD
items.p: The Paramount Skydance-Warner Brothers Discovery merger overcame a major hurdle as the US Justice Department have approved the deal.

items.h: Jack Perry Seemingly Responds To Report Regarding CM Punk-AEW Relationship
items.p: Never say never when it comes to CM Punk mending fences with AEW, unless you're Jack Perry, who has made opinion on recent reports felt.

items.h: AEW Dynamite ratings take hit against NBA Finals
items.p: This week’s AEW Dynamite averaged 542,000 viewers on TBS, down 15.1% from the previous week’s 648,000 and its lowest audience for the show since January 21. The show also averaged a 0.08 rating in...
